title: Vanishing
description: Adds 2 new functions/commands that let you "leave" and "join" worlds, (wink wink, nudge nudge)
body:
Adds 2 new functions/commands that let you \"leave\" and \"join\" worlds, (wink wink, nudge nudge)

**/function vanish:**

Makes you invisible and sends a fake leave message to the chat

**/function unvanish:**

Makes you visible and sends a fake join message to the chat
